title: tribulus subramanyamii
intro: Tribulus subramanyamii is a plant species belonging to the family Zygophyllaceae, commonly known as the caltrop or cat's claw. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Tribulus subramanyamii is believed to offer various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, enhancing male fertility, and supporting kidney function. Herbal preparations of Tribulus subramanyamii include capsules, tablets, and powders, often taken in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
